message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-batch-executor): pin BatchExecutor validation + topological planning + execution semantics (resolves flywheel_connectors-ufe6w)

19 tests complementing the existing host_batch_invoke_contract
(which pins JSON wire format only) — now pins the EXECUTION
semantics every batch invocation flows through.

- validate rejection contract: empty ops, duplicate id, zero
  max_parallelism, unknown depends_on, self-dependency, dependency
  cycle — each with distinct InvalidFilter literal substring for
  log greps
- plan topological tiering: independent ops → single tier (depth=1,
  max_width=N); A→B→C chain → depth=3, max_width=1; A→{B,C}→D
  diamond → depth=3, max_width=2; first-tier root identification
- ExecutionPlan::depth/max_width on empty plan (no panic from
  .max() on empty iterator)
- execute_sync semantics: all-success → BatchStatus::Success +
  zero failed/skipped; stop_on_first_error → first failure aborts,
  downstream tiers Skipped, BatchStatus::Aborted; continue-on-failure
  default → partial fail yields PartialSuccess; OperationResult
  carries duration_ms field
- ZoneRegistry register/get_zone roundtrip; absent tool returns None
- ExecutionTier struct constructible with operation_ids

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
